records.display_name: Q44 Select Bus Service on Main Street - Queens Community Board 7 Presentation

payload.title: Q44 Select Bus Service on Main Street

records.display_name: Main St Bus Bulbs Capital Project

payload.description: Capital project including bus bulbs. NB Bus Stop at Booth Memorial Av relocated to new location north of hospital entrance; future bus bulb.
payload.location_text: Main St at Booth Memorial Av, Queens

normalized_location.raw_text: Main St at Booth Memorial Av, Queens

payload.description: Left turn restrictions at: SB Main St to Maple Av; NB Main St to Franklin Av; NB Main St to Booth Memorial Av; WB Booth Memorial to Main St; NB Main St to 59 Av; SB Main St to 60 Av. Left turn from SB Main to 56 Av is retained.
payload.location_text: Main St and Booth Memorial Av, Queens

normalized_location.raw_text: Main St and Booth Memorial Av, Queens

payload.description: New curb regulations for bus lane hours and metered parking on Main St. Curbside bus lane blocks: 6 AM to 10 AM, 4 PM to 7 PM, Mon to Sat. Offset bus lane blocks: 7 AM to 7 PM, Mon-Sun.

records.display_name: Main St Area Curbside Bus Lanes

payload.description: Curbside bus lanes with midday parking on WB Hillside Ave from Sutphin Blvd to Queens Blvd, and NB and SB Sutphin Blvd from Hillside Av to Archer Av.
payload.location_text: Hillside Ave from Sutphin Blvd to Queens Blvd; Sutphin Blvd from Hillside Av to Archer Av, Queens

normalized_location.raw_text: Hillside Ave from Sutphin Blvd to Queens Blvd; Sutphin Blvd from Hillside Av to Archer Av, Queens

payload.description: Riders pay with MetroCard or coins before boarding. Take ticket from machine. Board bus through all three doors.
Offset bus lanes on Main St from 60 Av to 40 Rd. NB Main St from 60 Av to 40 Rd, SB Main St from 40 Rd to 60 Av.
payload.location_text: Main St from 60 Av to 40 Rd, Queens
